initiatives.title: Generative AI classroom-use guidelines and sample syllabi
initiatives.description: AIDA classroom-use guidance tells BU faculty to set explicit GenAI course policies, explain them in the first week, disclose instructor use, and use sample syllabi and policies submitted by BU faculty.
initiatives.significance: This is an assessment and syllabus redesign signal tied to classroom implementation rather than only a policy report.

investment.description: No public dollar amount found in cited source.

initiatives.title: AI at BU undergraduate certificate
initiatives.description: BU launched a four-hour online AI at BU student certificate for undergraduates alongside expanded faculty and staff AI resources.
initiatives.significance: Adds a student-facing AI literacy and usage signal tied to a concrete course-like credential.

computing_infrastructure.summary: BU Research Computing documents GPU computing on the Shared Computing Cluster, including NVIDIA GPU nodes for batch and interactive workloads and current examples spanning A100, A100-80G, A40, A6000, and H200 models. The technical summary lists GPU-equipped SCC nodes, but public pages present live inventory through the qgpus command rather than a single durable total GPU count.

equity_and_access_initiatives.title: TerrierGPT access
equity_and_access_initiatives.description: BU lists TerrierGPT as a secure gateway for equitable access to leading models while warning against public-tool use for restricted data.

regulatory_context.summary: State and system AI context checked only at high level; institution-level sources carry the profile.

narrative_summary: Boston University now shows a stronger platform and compute story. TerrierGPT provides BU students, faculty, staff, and researchers with secure, no-charge access during the pilot to leading models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, and others, while BU also lists Copilot Chat and Google Gemini as conversational AI options. Research Computing documents GPU workloads on the Shared Computing Cluster, including A100, A100-80G, A40, A6000, and H200 examples. AIDA classroom guidance and the AI at BU undergraduate certificate add explicit assessment, syllabus, and student-facing AI literacy evidence. Exact TerrierGPT usage, contract costs, AI budget totals, current SCC aggregate GPU count, and subgroup outcome metrics remain undisclosed.
